house_prices.dataset_description: Kaggle Ames Housing dataset. Predicts house sale price (continuous). Contains 43 categorical columns and 37 numeric. Many ordinal categories with quality ratings (ExterQual, BsmtQual, KitchenQual, HeatingQC, FireplaceQu, GarageQual, GarageCond, PoolQC: Ex>Gd>TA>Fa>Po). Some nominal (Neighborhood 25 values, Exterior1st 15, Foundation 6, SaleType 9). High missing values in Alley, PoolQC, Fence, MiscFeature, FireplaceQu. Leakage column Id already removed.
house_prices.notes: Dataset domain: real estate. Categorical nature: mix of ordinal (quality ratings) and nominal (neighborhood, style). One-hot encoding for nominal categories, ordinal for quality ratings. Scaling critical. Warning: high dimensionality from 43 categorical columns may hurt KNN.
